result.stdout:
Mono-repository CLI tooling.

Usage: mrepo [command] [options] [[--] <arg>...]

Options:
  -v|--version  Display version of this tool.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  build         Build a specific location.
  explain       Display explanation of an item inside the mono-repository.
  fix           Fix problem in a current location.
  info          Display information of a current location.
  list          Show list of items in a specific location.
  new           Create new project, workstead, version, mono-repository or add
                package.
  release       Create new release of a current location.
  run           Run any preconfigured command.
  show          Show detailed information about a current location.
  update        Update version or package in a current location.

Run 'mrepo [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Mono-repository CLI tooling.

Usage: mrepo [command] [options] [[--] <arg>...]

Options:
  -v|--version  Display version of this tool.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  build         Build a specific location.
  explain       Display explanation of an item inside the mono-repository.
  fix           Fix problem in a current location.
  info          Display information of a current location.
  list          Show list of items in a specific location.
  new           Create new project, workstead, version, mono-repository or add
                package.
  release       Create new release of a current location.
  run           Run any preconfigured command.
  show          Show detailed information about a current location.
  update        Update version or package in a current location.

Run 'mrepo [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Build a specific location.

Usage: mrepo build [options]

Options:
  --path        Relative path in the mono-repository to build.
  -l|--profile  The profile of the build. Specify which
                Directory.<OPERATION>.<PROFILE>.proj file is used or which build
                script to use.
  -c|--clean    Perform clean operation.
  -r|--restore  Perform restore operation.
  -b|--build    Perform build operation (default).
  -t|--test     Perform test operation.
  -p|--pack     Perform pack operation.
  -x|--run      Run the project or a startup project.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Usage: mrepo list [options]

result.stdout:
Create new project, workstead, version, mono-repository or add package.

Usage: mrepo new [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  package       Add new package to centralized definition.
  project       Create new .net project.
  repository    Create new mono-repository.
  version       Create new version file.
  workstead     Create new workstead.

Run 'new [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Add new package to centralized definition.

Usage: mrepo new package [options] <PackageId> <PackageVersion>

Arguments:
  PackageId        Id of the package.
  PackageVersion   Target version of the package.

Options:
  -p|--prerelease  Determining whether to include pre-release versions.
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information.

result.stdout:
Show detailed information about a current location.

Usage: mrepo show [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information.

Commands:
  dependency-tree  Show dependency tree for a current location.
  packages         Show all available packages for a current location.
  usages           Show usages of a current location.
  versions         Show all versions of a current location.

Run 'show [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Show usages of a current location.

Usage: mrepo show usages [options]

Options:
  -s|--search      Will try to search any directory/repository for usages.
  -p|--as-package  Determining whether to include search for usages as package.
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information.

result.stdout:
Update version or package in a current location.

Usage: mrepo update [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  package       Update version of a specific package.
  version       Update version of a current location based on git history.

Run 'update [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Update version of a specific package.

Usage: mrepo update package [options] <PackageId> <PackageVersion>

Arguments:
  PackageId        Id of the package.
  PackageVersion   Target version of the package.

Options:
  -p|--prerelease  Determining whether to include pre-release versions.
  -m|--move        Determining whether you want to possibly move the package
                   version definition.
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information.

  PackageVersion   Target version of the package.

Options:
  -p|--prerelease  Determining whether to include pre-release versions.
  -m|--move        Determining whether you want to possibly move the package
                   version definition.
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information.
